description: Page with inline HTML and no renders → pos-supervisor:HtmlInPage warning

warnings.message: Pages should be controller-only (logic, no inline HTML). Move HTML to a partial and use {% render %}.

fix.description: Extract HTML into a partial and render it: `{% render "partial_name" %}`. Pages should contain only logic (graphql, assign, render, redirect_to).

proposed_fixes.description: Extract HTML into a partial and render it: `{% render "partial_name" %}`. Pages should contain only logic (graphql, assign, render, redirect_to).

domain_guide.rule: Pages are controllers — logic only, no inline HTML. Use graphql/render/function/redirect_to tags.

triggered_gotchas.message: Page title: use `metadata: { title: 'Static Title' }` in front matter for static titles, or `{% content_for 'title' %}Dynamic Title{% endcontent_for %}` for data-dependent titles.

Slugs use `:param` for dynamic segments (NOT `[param]`, `{param}`, or `<param>`). No leading `/`. For the home page (root `/`), omit the slug entirely — `app/views/pages/index.html.liquid` serves `/` by default. Examples: `products/:id`, `users/:user_id/orders/:id`, `search(/:query)`.

result.next_step: File has advisory warnings but none block the write. Review the warnings, then write the file to disk.
